title: Stussy Betrays CP0
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Sentomaru, Unknown person #5, Marines, Vegapunk, Unknown person #6 as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will get vegapunk out of here no matter what!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...is the fact that the Marines are contacting us without realizing it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, I will just do as I please!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Strawhat Luffy will let Dr. vegapunk board his ship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Letting vegapunk set sail safely is YOUR RESPONSIBILITY!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: something is definitely going to happen to this island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Make sure you get your creator off this island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They have to be inside the lab right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm really worn out from running around so much!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy, you broke the hoverboots with all that running.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell them I have no money to pay him back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Where did old man apple go?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everything in the lab is right here on the monitor.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As you can see, Bonney is right there.

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
